text:
Daniyar Abykhanov 
Newark, Delaware 19713 | 3027221995 | daniyar@udel.edu 
01/03/2025 
Dear Hiring Manager, 
I am writing to express my interest in the Data Scientist Intern position for the Summer 2025 
session at Mastercard. As a Master of Science in Data Science candidate at the University of 
Delaware, I am excited about the opportunity to apply my analytical skills, technical expertise, 
and passion for data science to support Mastercard’s efforts to drive innovation and deliver data-
driven insights in the financial services industry. 
Throughout my academic journey, I have gained extensive experience with tools and 
technologies such as Python, R, SQL, and machine learning libraries. I have developed strong 
skills in data analysis, statistical modeling, and predictive analytics, which have allowed me to

skills in data analysis, statistical modeling, and predictive analytics, which have allowed me to 
extract actionable insights from complex datasets. My coursework and hands-on projects have 
provided me with a solid foundation in areas such as finance data analytics, fraud detection, 
customer segmentation, and machine learning, all of which are relevant to Mastercard’s data-
driven mission. 
I am particularly drawn to Mastercard’s focus on using data science to enhance customer 
experiences, improve financial inclusion, and drive business growth. The opportunity to 
contribute to Mastercard’s innovative projects, such as improving payment solutions and 
enhancing transaction security, excites me. I am confident that my technical abilities, problem-
solving skills, and enthusiasm for working with cutting-edge data science techniques will allow

solving skills, and enthusiasm for working with cutting-edge data science techniques will allow 
me to make a meaningful impact during this internship. 
I am eager to bring my knowledge of data science to Mastercard and gain hands-on experience 
that aligns with my long-term career aspirations in data analytics and financial technology. 
Thank you for considering my application. I look forward to the opportunity to discuss how my 
skills and experiences align with the goals of the Data Scientist Intern position at Mastercard. 
Sincerely, 
Daniyar Abykhanov
